title: Better Client
description: A client-side mod for a better server experience
body:
## Description

**Better Client** is a mod making a better server experience for you.

As its name suggests, this is a ***client-side*** only mod with all the features to optimize your gaming experience to the fullest!

**All the features that have been added can be found in the [Wiki](https://enc.is-a.dev/better-client-wiki/)**

## Dependency

The vast majority of the features are switchable, and you can easily configure them visually within the game by **"YetAnotherConfigLib"** mod

Configuration files are also available.

**Since 5.0.0 version, YACL has become an optional dependency. But still suggest you to install it.**

## Development

This mod is being updated and more features will be added in the future!

Add my [discord](https://discord.gg/J2TwHucyzk) and talk to me.

> We do not recommend using versions 1.21.2 through 1.21.10, as you may encounter some performance issues, and these versions will never be updated again.
